author: Gerardus de Gouda (Gherit vander Gouden/Gerard van Gouda/Gerardus Tergouw, d. 1513)
title: Boexken van der missen
editions: Dat boexken vander missen door broeder Gherit vander Gouden, minderbroeder vander observanten, ed. L. Mees, 2 Vols (Louvain, 1946)
remarks: At least 24 editions since it came out: a.o. Gouda: Collaciebroders, 1506/Antwerp: Adriaen van Berghen, 1507/Antwerp: Henrick Eckert van Homberch, 1508/Antwerp: Hendrick Eckert van Homberch, 1510/Antwerp: Hendrick Eckert van Homberch, 1511/Antwerp: Hendrick Eckert van Homberch, 1512).
translations: A Latin version of the work was issued as Libellus de Missa Devotissimus  (Gouda, 1512?). There also exist French translations (a.o. L’interpretation et signification de la messe, Antwerp, 1529 & 1538) as well as English ones (London, 1532 & 1903).
